caveats.accepted_reason: The R15 external audit acceptance boundary is recorded separately and the older generated_from values remain visible as provenance caveats.
caveats.preserved_scope: R15 remains accepted with caveats through R15-009 only; R13 remains failed/partial and R14/R15 caveats are not removed.

caveats.accepted_reason: The R15 evidence index keeps its original generated_from values and is accepted only with this explicit caveat.
